<!--
Thanks for contributing to Shield! Please skim CONTRIBUTING.md first
if you haven't already — it covers the test/build workflow and the
ESM mocking gotcha for Jest.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets on WHAT changed and WHY. Link the issue if there is one. -->

-

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] New feature (additive, no breaking changes)
- [ ] Breaking change (consumer code needs updates — call out in summary)
- [ ] Docs / chore (no source changes)
- [ ] Tests / coverage

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify the change? Reviewers will run the same steps. -->

- [ ] `npm test` (must stay green)
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build` (clean tsc)
- [ ] Manual verification in `demo/` if the change affects runtime behaviour
- [ ] New / updated tests cover the change

## Coverage impact

<!-- If touching src/, paste before/after for affected files. Skip if N/A. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!--
Anything reviewers should pay attention to: API surface changes, perf
considerations, subtle behaviour shifts, follow-up work spun out as
separate PRs, etc.
-->
